nasb.text: They answered and said to him, “If this Man were not an evildoer, we would not have delivered Him to you.”

esv.text: They answered him, “If this man were not doing evil, we would not have delivered him over to you.”

cnv.text: 他們回答：“如果這個人沒有作惡，我們就不會把他交給你。”

ccb.text: 他们回答说：“如果祂没有为非作歹，我们也不会把祂送到你这里来。”

csbs.text: 他们回答说：“这个人如果不是作恶的，我们就不会把他交给你了。”
